default_binding.A1_ZONE_HINT: a shady green hollow of flat stones
default_binding.A2_ZONE_HINT: a sunny gap in the leaves
default_binding.B1_ZONE_HINT: a faint glow near the roof
default_binding.B1_DEADEND_PATH: the low gap under the workbench
default_binding.B1_FURNISHINGS: old cushions and a milk-crate table
default_binding.C2_ZONE_HINT: a faint glint among the roots

slots.meaning: The child protagonist leading the treasure hunt.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable child (name or role); capable, curious, not reckless.

slots.meaning: The hero's friend who travels with them throughout.
slots.guidance: A loyal peer companion, equally capable; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded outdoor place the hunt happens inside.
slots.guidance: One open, safe, explorable outdoor place with room to roam; wonder over dread; nothing hazardous.

slots.meaning: The home base the friends return to after a setback.
slots.guidance: A cozy, always-reachable spot near the threshold; safe to reach from anywhere in the story.

slots.meaning: The guiding document the friends follow throughout.
slots.guidance: A single hand-held object that shows the way; harmless, carried the whole story.

slots.meaning: The path indicator drawn on the guide document.
slots.guidance: A visible trail/marking on the guide object that the friends trace and that forks with the story.

slots.meaning: The marker on the guide document showing the final destination.
slots.guidance: A small, recognizable mark naming the endpoint; purely benign.

slots.meaning: The recurring consolation treat enjoyed after a setback.
slots.guidance: A simple, cheerful snack/drink; never a source of conflict or want.

slots.meaning: The named landmark the map points to first (route A).
slots.guidance: A distinct, safe destination named on the map; distinguishable from its siblings.

slots.meaning: The named landmark the map points to second (route B).
slots.guidance: A distinct, safe destination named on the map; distinguishable from its siblings.

slots.meaning: The named landmark the map points to third (route C).
slots.guidance: A distinct, safe destination named on the map; distinguishable from its siblings.

slots.meaning: [A1] The first physical feature this track leads to.
slots.guidance: A safe, distinctive physical feature; no hazard.

slots.meaning: [A1] The sensory cue (sound) noticed on this track.
slots.guidance: A benign, distinctive sound; never alarming.

slots.meaning: [A1] The glimpse/hint of the track's inner zone before the final approach.
slots.guidance: An inviting, safe glimpse of what lies ahead.

slots.meaning: [A1] The wrong-turn option at this track's fork (leads to a harmless setback).
slots.guidance: A passable, non-hazardous wrong turn; retreat from it is always safe.

slots.meaning: [A1] The right-turn option at this track's fork (leads onward to the reward).
slots.guidance: A passable, safe route toward the track's reward.

slots.meaning: [A1] Ending: the harmless, pointless thing found down the wrong turn (setback).
slots.guidance: A mundane, faintly funny thing, never sad or frightening; names the setback ending.

slots.meaning: [A1] A small ring-shaped structure found in the zone.
slots.guidance: A tidy, harmless arrangement; wonder, not hazard.

slots.meaning: [A1] The friendly creatures discovered in the zone.
slots.guidance: Harmless, calm animals; never aggressive.

slots.meaning: [A1] The largest/most notable of the creatures.
slots.guidance: A gentle, curious figure; never a threat.

slots.meaning: [A1] A small decorative adornment worn by the leader creature.
slots.guidance: A whimsical, harmless decoration.

slots.meaning: [A1] Ending: the name of the positive discovery at the end of this track (success/completion).
slots.guidance: A short, warm, positive title; a benign discovery, keepsake, or new friendship.

slots.meaning: [A2] The first physical feature this track leads to.
slots.guidance: A safe, distinctive physical feature; no hazard.

slots.meaning: [A2] A small decorative detail noticed on this track's first landmark.
slots.guidance: A small, harmless decorative detail.

slots.meaning: [A2] The sensory cue (sound) noticed on this track.
slots.guidance: A benign, distinctive sound; never alarming.

slots.meaning: [A2] The glimpse/hint of the track's inner zone before the final approach.

slots.meaning: [A2] The wrong-turn option at this track's fork (leads to a harmless setback).
slots.guidance: A passable, non-hazardous wrong turn; retreat from it is always safe.

slots.meaning: [A2] The right-turn option at this track's fork (leads onward to the reward).
slots.guidance: A passable, safe route toward the track's reward.

slots.meaning: [A2] Ending: the harmless, pointless thing found down the wrong turn (setback).
slots.guidance: A mundane, faintly funny thing, never sad or frightening; names the setback ending.

slots.meaning: [A2] The small objects that dangle and knock together.
slots.guidance: Ordinary, harmless found objects.

slots.meaning: [A2] The hanging chimes discovered along the track.
slots.guidance: A gentle, musical installation; safe to approach.

slots.meaning: [A2] The largest, central chime at the heart of the zone.
slots.guidance: The track's centerpiece; safe to touch.

slots.meaning: [A2] Ending: the name of the positive discovery at the end of this track (success/completion).
slots.guidance: A short, warm, positive title; a benign discovery, keepsake, or new friendship.
